error_signature: Unable to sign without access token
title: Zoho Desk API access token error
symptom: When attempting to make an HTTP request to the Zoho Desk API, n8n throws 'Unable to sign without access token'. This occurs even with a successful account authentication.
not_this_if: Access token is correctly provided in the request
root_cause: The error occurs because the Zoho Desk API requires a specific domain format for the access token to be valid. If the domain is not correctly specified, the API cannot sign the request, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Change the API domain to end with '.eu'
Retry the HTTP request to the Zoho Desk API
agent_instruction: Ensure the API domain ends with '.eu' and retry the request.
